customEvents.name: Murals of Hellissandur
customEvents.notes:
The street art capital of Iceland. 

In the summer of 2018, a team of international artists including Camilo Arias, Ban Pesk, and Luis Rincon were summoned to Hellissandur by Kári Viðarsson, creator of "The Freezer," to transform an abandoned fish factory and several unadorned buildings around town into 30 large works of art. Each mural is inspired by a local story, from Iceland's only recorded serial killer Áxlar-Björn to Jules Verne's "The Journey to the Center of the Earth," where a professor, his nephew, and a guide try to reach the center of the Earth through the Snæfellsjökull volcano located a mile and a half from Hellissandur.

notes.text: Last stuff the turf house churches built in the late 1800s
Really fun troll garden with lots of children's fairytales and mini activities.
Love me a church. So stark!
Homemade sourdough and beef from next door. And $9 cokes.

One of us stopped at the Hot Springs for a nice soak, and the three more athletic ones went to the summit to add some mileage!

The one who stayed for a second was also the one who got back early enough for a beer.
Viking sheep pens!
Such a fun road tripping country.
Our first off roading adventure in the Land Cruiser
Volcano craters as the as the eye can see.
737 Max. Wish us luck!
Nerd Becah was in nerd heaven
Glad we weren't on the boardwalk in 2008!

Too overcast to see all the great colors

Duster cars. Cute.
Not so hot that you can't stay in for a while!

Café Bryggjan

Lamb and lobster soup. 

They were out of pickled herring and one of us was sad :(. But they had local beer so that made up for it.

This looks steep. And long. 
We survived. It was scary and nuts. We didn't summit. Nobody we saw did.

Snorkeling between tectonic plates! 2 degree Celsius water. So we had dry suits. Which are just like they advertise. Pretty amazing. Lips frozen but rest of body pretty comfy. Water had (apparently) the most visibility of anywhere on earth. It was quite clear.
Nice hike w waterfalls and continental a divides.
Well we got some shorties. Highlight was litl geysir
Bigger than Niagra, apparently!
Lebowski bar! Very dedicated to the movie. Sorry France didn't play better but vamos Spain! It
I would hardly say this was a secret most people were visiting both but it was worth it. And quite wet.
Lots of tourists so we're gonna come at the crack of dawn which really means time of day because there's no darkness!
A nice one and further you go the more waterfalls you get and and the fewer humans there with you
No rain is gonna prevent this Oakland love pic.
We are at Strondin pub in Vic. Got here just in time to get a table.
The Toyota Land Cruiser has a new Action shot. It's quite photogenic wouldn't u say?
Our first Icelandic hotdog! Guess who got the one with Doritos?
Literally a straight up hike. 3 1/2 up and 3 1/2 down but we made it to the top of a for now inactive volcano.
As advertised it does look exactly like Yoda
It was ok. The black crust is a gimic. But it's pizza so we were happy.
Glacier hike!
Had good ipas and tasty food.
This was the night that William learned about the concept of playing with house money!
